BAD: TARGET — 1 if the applicant defaulted or became seriously delinquent, 0 if repaid.
MORTDUE: Amount currently owed on the applicant's existing mortgage (USD).
VALUE: Current assessed value of the applicant's property (USD).
REASON: Purpose of the loan — DebtCon (debt consolidation) or HomeImp (home improvement).
JOB: Applicant's occupation category (Mgr, Office, Other, ProfExe, Sales, Self).
YOJ: Years at present job — a proxy for employment stability.
DEROG: Number of major derogatory reports on the applicant's credit file.
DELINQ: Number of delinquent credit lines (accounts with missed/late payments).
CLAGE: Age of the applicant's oldest credit line, in months.
CLNO: Total number of credit lines the applicant holds.
DEBTINC: Debt-to-income ratio — monthly debt divided by monthly income. Higher = more stretched.
